criteria.text: with no model.yaml present, the full verify gate (build, tests, fixtures, e2e) passes unchanged against the embedded canonical model — byte-identical CLI output and unchanged committed fixtures
verdi model check exits 2 on operational trouble, 1 with the pinned frontier error text on a structurally-deviant manifest, and 0 with an OK line naming schema, counts, and digest on a valid one

a store with an edited template (added body section and a custom: field) scaffolds new specs from it, the custom field survives strict decode and re-emit, and model check round-trips every template fail-closed
a store with vocabulary display renames shows the renamed state, verb, and class labels on CLI verdicts, board, dex, and MCP tool descriptions, while ids in refs, branches, and history stay unchanged

every frozen/provenance mint routes through a single stamping seam, obligation stamps derive from the covered commit rather than wall-clock, and stamps carry the resolved model's canonical-JSON digest
